title: Cast struct to bits in an incorrect order in the emitted SV

features.name: packed_struct_to_bits_cast
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with multiple fields being cast to a bit vector using a cast(bit) operation
features.snippet:
struct packed {logic [7:0] a0; logic [7:0] a1; logic [7:0] a2; logic [7:0] a3; logic [7:0] a4; } io_deq_bits;
assign io_deq_bits = /*cast(bit)*/_ram_ext_R0_data;

features.name: queue_instantiation_with_struct_type
features.description: Code should include a Queue module instantiation with a struct type as the data element, using --preserve-aggregate=all
features.snippet: module Queue2_MyTest(input clock, input reset, input struct packed {logic [7:0] a0; logic [7:0] a1; logic [7:0] a2; logic [7:0] a3; logic [7:0] a4; } io_enq_bits, output io_deq_valid, output struct packed {logic [7:0] a0; logic [7:0] a1; logic [7:0] a2; logic [7:0] a3; logic [7:0] a4; } io_deq_bits);

features.name: struct_field_assignment_to_concatenation
features.description: Code should include a packed struct field being assigned from a concatenation where field ordering matters for correct bit representation
